goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 19:15' and should leave on 'thursday'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should go to 'kings lynn'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for '7 people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee'.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should arrive by 19:15 and should leave on thursday
The train should depart from cambridge and should go to kings lynn
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 7 people
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre
Make sure you get entrance fee
